chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | October 25, 2024. This newsletter provides updates for EECS undergraduate students at UC Berkeley. Key announcements include upcoming events, academic deadlines, and opportunities. Students are encouraged to review important dates and participate in department activities. The newsletter aims to keep students informed about resources and support available.

Upcoming events include workshops on career development and technical skills. Academic deadlines for course registration and project submissions are highlighted. Students can access tutoring services and advising appointments. The department offers research opportunities and internship programs. Participation in student organizations is encouraged for networking.

Important reminders about financial aid applications and scholarship deadlines. Health and wellness resources are available for student support. Campus safety protocols and emergency contacts are provided. Students should check their email for additional announcements. The newsletter is published regularly to ensure timely information.
